lifecycleScripts.afterStart: (cd feature-cards && npm run build) && (cd feature-cards-theme && npm run build) && wp-env run cli -- wp plugin activate feature-cards --allow-root && wp-env run cli -- wp theme activate feature-cards-theme --allow-root && wp-env run cli -- wp eval-file /var/www/html/wp-content/mu-plugins/feature-cards-scripts/sample-content.php --allow-root
